narrative.description: Rare's pre-rendered SNES platformer pairs DK and Diddy through jungle, mine, and temple stages with buddy swapping, barrel cannons, and Kremling boss gauntlets.
narrative.core_loop: Run and roll through stages, swap between DK and Diddy, collect K-O-N-G letters and bananas, and defeat area bosses to restore the banana hoard.

mechanics.map_notes: DK and Diddy swap with distinct jump and run capabilities.
mechanics.expression: DK and Diddy swap with distinct jump and run capabilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Animal buddies like Rambi and Enguarde alter movement and attack.
mechanics.expression: Animal buddies like Rambi and Enguarde alter movement and attack.

mechanics.map_notes: K-O-N-G letters, bananas, and bonus rooms gate completion.
mechanics.expression: K-O-N-G letters, bananas, and bonus rooms gate completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Mine carts, rope vines, and barrel sequences test timing.
mechanics.expression: Mine carts, rope vines, and barrel sequences test timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Area bosses like Very Gnawty gate map progression.
mechanics.expression: Area bosses like Very Gnawty gate map progression.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden bonus rooms and warp barrels reward exploration.
mechanics.expression: Hidden bonus rooms and warp barrels reward exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Extra lives from bananas and bonus games gate retries.
mechanics.expression: Extra lives from bananas and bonus games gate retries.

mechanics.map_notes: Buddy barrels and level flags checkpoint progress.
mechanics.expression: Buddy barrels and level flags checkpoint progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Tight rope and barrel sequences demand exact timing.
mechanics.expression: Tight rope and barrel sequences demand exact timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Roll attack clears enemies and breaks certain walls.
mechanics.expression: Roll attack clears enemies and breaks certain walls.

mechanics.map_notes: Kremling wind-up telegraphs before charge attacks.
mechanics.expression: Kremling wind-up telegraphs before charge attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: One hit loses current Kong unless invincibility barrel active.
mechanics.expression: One hit loses current Kong unless invincibility barrel active.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Donkey Kong Country through its core platformer loop.
